chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2220 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of MA No.8911/2018. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2018 and it came up in Court lastly on 05.09.2024 when counsel for the petitioner remained absent without intimation. Today position is the same. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
